songs.title: My Man on Willpower
feed: “My Man on Willpower” by Sabrina Carpenter debuts at #1 in Personal Hot 100.
“My Man on Willpower” by Sabrina Carpenter is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 183 sales units.
“My Man on Willpower” by Sabrina Carpenter is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 420 streams units.
“My Man on Willpower” by Sabrina Carpenter is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 490,503 total units.

Wake Me Up When September Ends
feed: “Wake Me Up When September Ends” by Green Day has now completed one year (52 weeks of charting) in Personal Hot 100.
“Wake Me Up When September Ends” by Green Day climbs inside the top 10 of Personal Hot 100, rising 86 spots to #7.
“Wake Me Up When September Ends” by Green Day is the biggest percentage gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week, rising 1131% to 320 points.
“Wake Me Up When September Ends” by Green Day is the biggest position gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week, rising 86 spots to #7.
“Wake Me Up When September Ends” by Green Day is the #1 most airplayed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 30 airplay units.
